svg.title: Bathroom memory fragment (apartment three) - faded warmth, humid quiet, fragments lingering in the mirror
svg.desc: A small bathroom remembered softly. Dusty cream upper wall, a band of faded pink subway tile, a cream marble counter and a soft sink basin. A large brass-framed mirror anchors the room. Inside the mirror: a soft silhouette that lags slightly behind, condensation patches with finger-written fragments still legible in places, and on certain visits a glimpse of an entirely different bathroom appears in the glass. A small wall sconce above the mirror gives off a warm pool of light that shifts very gently between moments. Sparse worn toiletries on the counter: a toothbrush cup, a bar of soap on a small dish, a faded-label bottle, a folded washcloth. A dusty rose hand towel hangs on a short bar to the right. Steam rises softly from the sink. Water stains around the faucet. The whole scene is muted and humid - more wistful than uncanny.
